title: CNBC's UK Exchange newsletter: Britain's jet fuel crunch — and how we got here
summary_full: The U.K.'s supply chain vulnerabilities could harm Britain’s ability to source jet fuel, posing a threat to the traditional summer getaway for British tourists.
summary_public: The U.K.'s supply chain vulnerabilities could harm Britain’s ability to source jet fuel, posing a threat to the traditional summer getaway for British tourists.
